title: picea koraiensis var. koraiensis
intro: Picea koraiensis var. koraiensis, also known as Korean fir, is a variety of evergreen tree that belongs to the pine family and is native to Korea and the surrounding regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Picea koraiensis var. koraiensis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. Traditionally, the herbal preparation of this plant involves infusing the needles in hot water to make a tea, which is often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
